mapper.sql: ( LPAD(TO_CHAR(cls.c_no), 2, '0') = LPAD(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TRIM(#{division,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '^[0-9]+'), 2, '0') OR TO_CHAR(cls.c_no) || '분반' = TRIM(#{division,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) OR LPAD(TO_CHAR(cls.c_no), 2, '0') || '분반' = TRIM(#{division,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) )
mapper.select: SELECT l.subject AS course_name, l.no AS course_id, LPAD(TO_CHAR(cls.c_no), 2, '0') || '분반' AS division, TO_CHAR(cls.c_year) || '-' || TO_CHAR(cls.c_semester) || '학기' AS semester, COALESCE(cls.c_now, 0) AS total_students, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_request cr WHERE cr.c_id = cls.c_id AND cr.c_no = cls.c_no AND cr.status = 'PENDING' ) AS request_count FROM user_account ua JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = ua.login_id JOIN class cls ON cls.p_id = p.p_id JOIN lecture l ON l.no = cls.c_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND l.no = #{courseId} AND AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND

SELECT request_id, student_id, name, grade, major, created_at, reason FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(cr.request_id) AS request_id, s.s_id AS student_id, s.s_name AS name, s.s_year AS grade, s.s_major AS major, TO_CHAR(cr.requested_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(cr.reason, 4000, 1) AS reason, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cr.requested_at DESC, cr.request_id DESC) AS row_num FROM course_request cr JOIN student s ON s.s_id = cr.s_id JOIN class cls ON cls.c_id = cr.c_id AND cls.c_no = cr.c_no JOIN lecture l ON l.no = cls.c_id JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = cls.p_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.login_id = p.p_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND ua.role = 'PROFESSOR' AND l.no = #{courseId} AND AND cls.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND AND cr.status = 'PENDING' ) WHERE row_num > (GREATEST(COALESCE(#{page,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 1), 1) - 1) * GREATEST(COALESCE(#{size,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 20), 1) AND row_num <= GREATEST(COALESCE(#{page,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 1), 1) * GREATEST(COALESCE(#{size,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 20), 1) ORDER BY row_num

{ CALL PROCESS_COURSE_REQUEST( #{professorUserId, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{courseId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{division, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outRequestId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outStatus, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outUpdatedAt, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP, javaType=java.sql.Timestamp} ) }
